title: AMC Q2 2021 Earnings Preview: Is the Bleeding Done?
text: The Motley Fool examined AMC Entertainment's anticipated second-quarter earnings report, scheduled for Monday, August 9, 2021. AMC faced severe cash challenges, with the company burning through approximately $120 million monthly during the previous quarter while generating just $148 million in revenue. The organization carried $5.4 billion in debt with annual interest obligations exceeding $600 million. Economic reopenings and theatrical releases of major films offered hope. Summer 2021 blockbusters including F9: The Fast Saga, Black Widow, and Godzilla vs. Kong had each surpassed $200 million in box office receipts. Wall Street analysts anticipated $375 million in quarterly revenue and a $0.93 loss per share. The stock had climbed over 1,400% year-to-date but declined 35% within the previous month, demonstrating significant volatility that warranted investor caution.
